The '''dua-wurm''' was a [[Species/Legends|species]] of creature that could be found living underground on the [[Planet/Legends|world]] of [[Cularin/Legends|Cularin]].<ref name="AR">{{LivingForce|Eye of the Sun: Revelation and Refutation}}</ref> They were two-headed purple [[Worm/Legends|worm]]-like creatures that reached over two [[Meter/Legends|meters]] in length. Their needle-like [[Tooth/Legends|teeth]] delivered [[Acid/Legends|acid]] into their prey with each bite, but the two heads could not attack the same creature at the same time.

A dua-wurm attacked some allies of the [[Cularin resistance]] in the [[Cloud Mountain mines]]. They had been walking in a tunnel with a weak floor, which collapsed into the tunnel in which the wurm was resting.<ref name="AR" />
